metadata.title: Free Online Tools — Atlas Studio
metadata.description: Free online tools for developers and designers. QR code generator, image converter, background remover, JSON formatter and more.

home.hero_title: Powerful tools, right in your browser
home.hero_subtitle: Convert, compress, generate — all without a server, no sign-up, completely free.
home.privacy_description: All tools run directly in your browser. No files are uploaded to any server.
home.no_signup_description: Use every tool instantly — no account, no email, no registration.
home.instant_description: Everything runs client-side. Get results in milliseconds, not minutes.
home.cta_description: Atlas Studio builds web apps, mobile apps, and cloud solutions.

tools.title: All Tools
tools.subtitle: Choose a tool to get started

qr-code-generator.name: QR Code Generator
qr-code-generator.description: Generate QR codes from text or URLs. Download as PNG or SVG.

image-converter.name: Image Converter
image-converter.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, WebP, ICO and AVIF formats.
image-converter.unsupported_avif: AVIF is not supported in your browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.

image-compressor.name: Image Compressor
image-compressor.description: Reduce image file sizes while maintaining quality.

background-remover.name: Background Remover
background-remover.description: Remove image backgrounds automatically with AI — right in your browser.
background-remover.max_size_warning: For best results, use images under 10MB

color-picker.name: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Pick colors, generate palettes, copy in HEX/RGB/HSL formats.

base64-encoder.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64-encoder.description: Encode and decode text and files to and from Base64.
base64-encoder.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or decode...

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format, validate and minify JSON directly in your browser.

lorem-ipsum-generator.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Generate placeholder text in Latin or Albanian.

password-generator.name: Password Generator
password-generator.description: Generate secure, random passwords with customizable rules.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in your text.
word-counter.placeholder: Start typing or paste your text here...

css-gradient-generator.name: CSS Gradient Generator
css-gradient-generator.description: Create beautiful CSS gradients with a visual editor.

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.description: Write Markdown and see it rendered in real time.
markdown-preview.placeholder:
# Hello World

Start writing Markdown here...

url-encoder.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
url-encoder.description: Encode and decode URLs and query parameters.

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps, ISO 8601, and human-readable dates.

image-to-pdf.name: Image to PDF
image-to-pdf.description: Convert one or more images into a single PDF document.

pdf-merge.name: PDF Merge
pdf-merge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document.

pdf-to-image.name: PDF to Image
pdf-to-image.description: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPEG images.

image-resizer.name: Image Resizer
image-resizer.description: Resize images to exact dimensions or social media presets.

favicon-generator.name: Favicon Generator
favicon-generator.description: Generate favicons and app icons in all sizes from a single image.

svg-to-png.name: SVG to PNG
svg-to-png.description: Convert SVG vector files to high-resolution PNG images.

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case and more.
case-converter.input_placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

text-diff.name: Text Diff
text-diff.description: Compare two texts side by side and highlight the differences.

ocr-image-to-text.name: OCR — Image to Text
ocr-image-to-text.description: Extract text from images using optical character recognition.

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time matching and highlighting.

uuid-generator.name: UUID Generator
uuid-generator.description: Generate random UUIDs (v4) in various formats.

hash-generator.name: Hash Generator
hash-generator.description: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 and SHA-512 hashes from text or files.
hash-generator.input_placeholder: Type or paste text to hash...

invoice-generator.name: Invoice Generator
invoice-generator.description: Create professional PDF invoices directly in your browser.
invoice-generator.notes_placeholder: Payment terms, bank details, thank you note...

og-preview.name: Open Graph Preview
og-preview.description: Preview how your website looks when shared on social media.
og-preview.fetch_error: Could not fetch the URL. Make sure it's accessible.

jwt-decoder.name: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens. View header, payload, and check expiration.
jwt-decoder.invalid_token: Invalid JWT format. A JWT must have 3 parts separated by dots.

csv-json-converter.name: CSV ↔ JSON Converter
csv-json-converter.description: Convert CSV data to JSON and JSON arrays to CSV format.

number-base-converter.name: Number Base Converter
number-base-converter.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal bases.

color-contrast-checker.name: Color Contrast Checker
color-contrast-checker.description: Check WCAG color contrast ratios to ensure accessibility compliance.

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, volume, speed and area.

age-calculator.name: Age Calculator
age-calculator.description: Calculate age from date of birth. Get years, months, days, weeks and birthday countdown.
age-calculator.dob_after_ref: Date of birth cannot be after the reference date.

vat-calculator.name: VAT Calculator
vat-calculator.description: Add or remove VAT from any price. Calculate net, VAT amount and gross price.

iban-validator.name: IBAN Validator
iban-validator.description: Validate IBAN numbers and check bank country, format, and checksum.

line-sorter.name: Line Sorter
line-sorter.description: Sort, reverse, shuffle, or deduplicate lines of text.

url-slug-generator.name: URL Slug Generator
url-slug-generator.description: Convert any text into a clean, SEO-friendly URL slug.

morse-code.name: Morse Code
morse-code.description: Encode text to Morse code or decode Morse code back to text.

find-replace.name: Find & Replace
find-replace.description: Find and replace text with support for regex, case sensitivity, and whole-word matching.

character-limit-checker.name: Character Limit Checker
character-limit-checker.description: Check character counts against Twitter, LinkedIn, SMS, meta tags and more.
character-limit-checker.input_placeholder: Start typing or paste your text here...

barcode-generator.name: Barcode Generator
barcode-generator.description: Generate barcodes in Code 128, EAN-13, QR Code, Data Matrix and more formats.

exif-viewer.name: EXIF Data Viewer
exif-viewer.description: View EXIF metadata from photos and optionally strip it for privacy.
exif-viewer.strip_description: Download a clean copy with all EXIF data removed (GPS, camera info, etc.)
exif-viewer.no_exif: No EXIF data found in this image.

pdf-page-extractor.name: PDF Page Extractor
pdf-page-extractor.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF file and download them as a new PDF.
pdf-page-extractor.invalid_range: Invalid page range. PDF has {max} pages.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to work together? Get in touch.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success_message: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

common.upload_hint: Drag & drop here or click to upload
common.privacy_note: Everything is processed in your browser. No files are sent to any server.

footer.tagline: Free online tools by Atlas Studio

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Notice
cookieConsent.message: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our tools and improve your experience. No personal data is sold or shared.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
